name: panicdna-skills
description: Tooling skills for the Claude Code / OpenCode ecosystem, maintained by panicdna.

plugins.name: agent-port
plugins.description: Convert subagent definitions between Claude Code and OpenCode by driving the bundled agent_port CLI (convert / check / batch). Auto-detects source format, maps model aliases and tools <-> permission, and reports every lossy field instead of dropping it silently.
